reasoning.research_depth: Deep technical expertise in security research. Demonstrates real vulnerability analysis with thorough understanding of the underlying systems.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent focus on technical content with minimal filler. Every segment directly contributes to understanding the security concept being explored.
reasoning.originality: Distinctive approach combining real-world security research with educational content. The hands-on exploitation demonstrations are genuinely unique.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong evergreen potential for security education. Fundamental concepts and methodologies remain relevant even as specific vulnerabilities get patched.
